gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor excitedly jumps in place, waving both hands overhead while announcing today’s addition lesson
a tutor leans slightly forward, raising a hand with fingers spread wide as if inviting answers from the class
a person kneels down to eye level, holding up five fingers on one hand and then adding five more with the other
a tutor tilts their head and spreads arms wide to emphasize the question about total apples
a person steps to the side, pointing to an imaginary number line while explaining how to solve five plus five
a tutor hops energetically, mimicking a jump forward as they describe moving from five on the number line
a person claps their hands together joyfully, smiling at the class while praising their addition learning efforts
a tutor makes inviting gestures with both hands, emphasizing the idea of putting groups together in addition
